## Schema.post() method

Adds a post middleware for the given event(s)

**Signature:**

```typescript
post<E extends MiddlewareKeys | RegExp | (MiddlewareKeys | RegExp)[]>(name: E, fn: MiddlewareFn<FindMiddlewareContext<E, HydratedDoc>>): Schema;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

name


</td><td>

E


</td><td>

name of the event(s) to add the middleware for, can be a string, array of strings or regex


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

fn


</td><td>

MiddlewareFn&lt;[FindMiddlewareContext](./iodm.findmiddlewarecontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;E, HydratedDoc&gt;&gt;


</td><td>


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[Schema](./iodm.schema.md)

schema instance for chaining

## Example


```ts
const userSchema = new Schema({
 firstName: String,
 lastName: String,
});

userSchema.post('save', function() {
 console.log(this.firstName + ' ' + this.lastName, 'User has been saved');
});
```
